def deduplicate_ids(records):
    unique = []
    for record in records:
        if record["id"] not in unique:
            unique.append(record["id"])
    return unique


def find_new_entries(existing, incoming):
    new_items = []
    for item in incoming:
        if item not in existing:
            new_items.append(item)
    return new_items


def filter_seen(events, seen_list):
    result = []
    for event in events:
        if event["event_id"] not in seen_list:
            seen_list.append(event["event_id"])
            result.append(event)
    return result
